title: PNCH-10009 Pants of the World featuring Yu Shinoda - Yu Kawakami (Shizuku Morino)
overview: Packed with newly shot panchira video presented by Wanich and a carefully selected selection of special panchira panmoro. This time, featuring Yu Shinoda, "Temptation JK Pants" and "Koibito Ichaicha Tickling Pants" are also included. Panchira ★ compilation for pants lovers by pants lovers.
